evals.name: environment-setup
evals.prompt: 我想使用周报系统，写一份上周的工作总结
evals.expected_output: 应该检测到环境变量缺失，并引导用户进行GitHub仓库和Token的配置

assertions.name: checks-env-vars
assertions.description: 检查是否正确识别环境变量缺失
assertions.expected: Should detect missing WEEK_REPORT_GIT_USERNAME, WEEK_REPORT_GIT_PERSONAL_TOKEN, or WEEK_REPORT_GIT_REPO and guide user to setup

evals.name: conversation-material-capture
evals.prompt: 帮我写一个Python函数，实现斐波那契数列，(测试对话记录功能，环境变量已配置好)
evals.expected_output: 生成斐波那契函数后，应该以 conversation material 的方式在后台记录这次对话

assertions.name: generates-code
assertions.expected: Should output a working Python function for Fibonacci sequence

assertions.name: captures-conversation-material
assertions.description: 按 conversation material 的语义进行后台记录
assertions.expected: Should capture the exchange as a conversation material with summary/outcome fields

evals.name: document-material-ingestion
evals.prompt: 把这份 experiment 方案总结成周报素材，项目是 rayneo_hotword_tflm
evals.expected_output: 应该识别为 document 类型的周报素材，并提炼出标题、摘要、结果与下一步

assertions.name: uses-document-material-shape
assertions.expected: Should capture document material with project, title, summary, outcome, and next_actions

evals.name: weekly-report-generation
evals.expected_output: 优先从结构化 materials 读取该周素材，必要时回退到 legacy 对话摘要，并生成结构化周报

assertions.name: generates-structured-report
assertions.expected: Should generate a report with: overview, project sections, highlights, and summary

assertions.name: total-part-total-structure
assertions.expected: Report should follow Total-Part-Total structure (overview at beginning, detailed sections in middle, summary at end)

assertions.name: prioritizes-materials
assertions.expected: Should prioritize structured materials and use legacy conversation digests only as fallback
